bullets.text: Rebuilt the JavaScript and TypeScript checkout tier on PostgreSQL, eliminating 92% of paging alerts.
Drove a DevOps blameless-postmortem culture across 7 squads; introduced the Wombat error-budget policy.
Shipped the Quokka iPhone companion app used by 40k field couriers.
Designed the Bandersnatch autoscaling controller that survived a 14x Black-Friday spike.

sections.raw_text:
QUINCEY ADVERSARIO-RESIDUAL
Staff Reliability Engineer — Zylophone Freight Systems (Perth, AU)

SUMMARY
Reliability engineer who cut p99 checkout latency from 3200ms to 340ms on the Kestrel-9 order platform and authored the Marmoset incident-runbook adopted org-wide.

EXPERIENCE
Zylophone Freight Systems — Staff Reliability Engineer (2021-2026)
- Rebuilt the JavaScript and TypeScript checkout tier on PostgreSQL, eliminating 92% of paging alerts.
- Drove a DevOps blameless-postmortem culture across 7 squads; introduced the Wombat error-budget policy.
- Shipped the Quokka iPhone companion app used by 40k field couriers.
Frobnitz Logistics — Senior SRE (2017-2021)
- Designed the Bandersnatch autoscaling controller that survived a 14x Black-Friday spike.

SKILLS: JavaScript, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, DevOps, Terraform, incident response.
EDUCATION: B.Eng (Software), University of Woop Woop, 2016.
